Index

C D E G I M P R S T U V 
All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

C

CashInventory - Class in Unnamed Package
Represents the cash reserves of the vending machine.
CashInventory() - Constructor for class CashInventory
Constructs an empty cash inventory.
collectCash() - Method in class VendingMachine
Collects all money currently stored in the vending machine.

D

dispenseChange(double) - Method in class CashInventory
Dispenses the specified amount of change using the available cash reserves.
displayDenominations() - Method in class CashInventory
Displays all supported denominations together with their available quantities.
displayInventory(ArrayList<Slot>) - Method in class TransactionHistory
Displays the inventory summary.
displayItems() - Method in class VendingMachine
Displays all available items in the vending machine.
displaySalesSummary() - Method in class TransactionHistory
Displays the sales summary since the latest restocking.
displayTransactionSummary(Scanner) - Method in class VendingMachine
Displays the transaction summary menu.

E

enoughChange(double) - Method in class CashInventory
Determines whether the vending machine has sufficient cash reserves to provide the specified amount of change.
extractCash() - Method in class CashInventory
Collects all money currently stored in the vending machine.

G

getCal() - Method in class Item
Returns the calorie count of the item.
getDenominations() - Method in class CashInventory
Returns the list of supported denominations.
getItem() - Method in class Slot
Returns the item stored in this slot.
getMaxQuantity() - Method in class Slot
Returns the maximum quantity of the item that can be stored in this slot.
getName() - Method in class Item
Returns the name of the item.
getPrice() - Method in class Item
Returns the selling price of the item.
getQuantity() - Method in class Slot
Returns the current quantity of the item in this slot.
getQuantitySold(Item) - Method in class TransactionHistory
Returns the quantity sold for a specific item.
getReserves() - Method in class CashInventory
Returns the current cash reserves.
getSales() - Method in class TransactionHistory
Returns the total sales recorded since the last restock.

I

Item - Class in Unnamed Package
Represents an item that can be stored and dispensed by the vending machine.
Item(String, double, int) - Constructor for class Item
Constructs an Item with the specified name, price, and calorie count.

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class Main
Starts the Vending Machine Simulator.
Main - Class in Unnamed Package
Entry point of the Vending Machine Simulator.
Main() - Constructor for class Main
 

P

purchaseItem(Scanner) - Method in class VendingMachine
Allows a customer to purchase one or more items.

R

replenishCash(Scanner) - Method in class VendingMachine
Replenishes the cash reserves of the vending machine.
resetSummary(ArrayList<Slot>) - Method in class TransactionHistory
Resets the transaction summary after a restocking operation.
restockItems(Scanner) - Method in class VendingMachine
Restocks items in the vending machine.

S

setPrice(double) - Method in class Item
Sets the selling price of the item.
setPrices(Scanner) - Method in class VendingMachine
Updates the prices of items in the vending machine.
setQuantity(int) - Method in class Slot
Sets the current quantity of the item in this slot.
setReserves(int, int) - Method in class CashInventory
Updates the quantity available for a specific denomination.
Slot - Class in Unnamed Package
Represents a slot in the vending machine that holds a specific item and its quantity.
Slot(Item, int, int) - Constructor for class Slot
Constructs a new Slot object.

T

TransactionHistory - Class in Unnamed Package
Stores and manages the transaction history of the vending machine.
TransactionHistory(HashMap<Item, Integer>, HashMap<Item, Integer>) - Constructor for class TransactionHistory
Constructs a TransactionHistory object.

U

updateQuantitySold(Item, int) - Method in class TransactionHistory
Updates the quantity sold for a specific item.
updateSales(double) - Method in class TransactionHistory
Adds the specified amount to the total sales.

V

VendingMachine - Class in Unnamed Package
Simulates a regular vending machine.
VendingMachine(int) - Constructor for class VendingMachine
Constructs a vending machine with a specified slot capacity.
